task_description: Fix the 'Failed to extract recipe using AI model' error by correcting the IAM policy ARN for Bedrock InvokeModel. The model 'eu.amazon.nova-lite-v1:0' is a cross-region inference profile, not a foundation model, so the ARN resource type and account field must be updated accordingly. Also increase Lambda timeout to 60s.

verification.summary: pnpm nx build infra and pnpm nx lint infra both pass. No tests exist in this project. Docker build not applicable.
